title: Kaiju Paradise Assets & Extras
description: Decorative blocks made to match the assets and art-style of the Roblox game "Kaiju Paradise."
body:
This mod adds several Kaiju Paradise themed decorative blocks & models. This includes crates, metal shelves, colored concrete + floor tiles, and more (as is shown in the Gallery section). More blocks and assets are likely to come!

**Warning, as this mod is terribly untested in regards to other mods and compatability. Please contact me if you find any issues and I'll do my best to fix them, but as of right now I would advise being careful adding this mod to pre-existing saves.**

Immense credit to MCreator, the program I made this mod on. All custom 3D assets were created via Blockbench, and ALL assets involved in this mod are based on things which are in the Roblox game Kaiju Paradise. "GhostBop" disk created in the music software Beepbox.
